articles.title: XRP Posts Wild “Pump and Dump” as Retail Buyers Give Whales an Exit
articles.description: The Wall Street Bets phenomenon recent took a grasp of the crypto market, with an army of retail investors first targeting Dogecoin before setting their sights on XRP XRP saw some slow momentum at first, but rumors regarding a “pump and dump” Telegram chat looking to rocket its price quickly circulated This led many traders […]

articles.title: XRP to Lose $50 Million Worth of Daily Trading Volume as Another Exchange Announces Delisting
articles.description: Derivatives trading platform PrimeXBT is set to delist XRP later this month, further drying up the token's liquidity

articles.title: Reddit rage as XRP price crashes 50% hours after hitting two-week highs
articles.description: The latest target of Reddit traders provides plenty of volatility — and losses — as XRP sees a burst of volatility on Monday.

articles.title: XRP Turns Negative After Massive Crash
articles.description: Tokyo-based Coincheck suspended XRP selling before resuming it about 10 minutes later, but it didn't save XRP from crashing

articles.title: Elon Musk: Bitcoin On “The Verge” Of Breaking Into Traditional Finance
articles.description: Elon Musk believes that Bitcoin is on the verge of breaking into the legacy financial system. Musk, who is the CEO of electric vehicle giant Tesla, stated in a recent interview that he sees more mainstream financial services integrating Bitcoin. The 49-year-old, who is currently the richest person in the world, delved into Bitcoin and […]

articles.title: Elon Musk: Bitcoin Close to Reaching “Broad Acceptance”
articles.description: Elon Musk has clarified his stance on Bitcoin. During a recent Clubhouse chat, the Tesla founder also spoke about changing mainstream views towards the digital currency. Musk Backs Bitcoin Speaking on a Clubhouse stream Sunday night, Musk said that Bitcoin was “a good thing.” The conversation came two days after Musk changed his Twitter bio to “#bitcoin,” resulting in a 20%...

articles.title: Elon Musk Now Supports Bitcoin, Saying It 'Is a Good Thing'
articles.description: Tesla CEO Elon Musk expresses his most positive statements about Bitcoin yet and claims it's on the verge of wider adoption.

articles.title: Kiss rocker Gene Simmons is bullish on DOGE and XRP
articles.description: Kiss frontman and a known crypto fan Gene Simmons is bullish on several cryptos including Bitcoin, Ether, XRP and Dogecoin.
